headline: Chevron Asia-Pacific Asset Sale To ENEOS Raises Fresh Capital Allocation Questions
summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) has agreed to sell key Asia-Pacific downstream and refining assets to ENEOS. The deal includes fuels and lubricants marketing businesses across several Asia-Pacific markets. Chevron is also transferring its 50% stake in the Singapore Refining Company to ENEOS. The transaction reshapes Chevron's footprint in Southeast Asia and adjusts its regional business mix. For Chevron, a global integrated energy company, downstream and refining are important pieces of a broader...

headline: Buffett Steps Aside: Abel's First Berkshire 13F Buys Delta Air Lines, Exits Visa And Mastercard
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-A)(NYSE:BRK-B) is no longer run by Warren Buffett, with Greg Abel as CEO. New positions in Delta, Macy's, Alphabet C. Exits include Visa, Mastercard, UnitedHealth, Domino's, Aon, Pool, Amazon, Heico, Formula One.
